coverage.forecastRange: No auditable group-wide annual revenue or net-income forecast retained
coverage.availabilityNote: FY2016-FY2025 are official consolidated annual actuals converted from EUR. No auditable group-wide annual forecast series is retained.

metrics.fxMethod: Multiply by annual average USD per EUR
metrics.basis: Eni S.p.A. consolidated figures are reported in EUR and converted to USD million using the arithmetic annual average of daily ECB USD/EUR reference rates. Capex is PPE additions, normalized as negative; FCF is CFO plus capex.
metrics.verificationNote: Official SEC XBRL annual values are selected by fiscal year-end from Eni's Form 20-F filings. EUR amounts are converted using the ECB daily reference-rate annual average. FY2025 annual report and full-year results are linked for cross-checking; FCF is derived.

profitability.title: Revenue and Net Income
profitability.subtitle: USD million
profitability.sourceLine: Source: FY2025 Annual Report，FY2025 Full Year Results
profitability.note: Official consolidated annual disclosures; no forecast series retained.

cashInvestment.title: Investments and Free Cash Flow
cashInvestment.titleCn: Eni 投资与自由现金流
cashInvestment.subtitle: USD million
cashInvestment.basisLabel: Cash capex / investment proxy and derived FCF
cashInvestment.sourceLine: Source: FY2025 Annual Report，FY2025 Full Year Results
cashInvestment.note: Investment bars show capex cash outflows. FCF equals operating cash flow plus capex.

definitions.definition: Group consolidated annual revenue, using the line item labelled Revenue or Sales in the source disclosure.
Group consolidated profit or loss for the year, including non-controlling interests where presented in the consolidated statement.
Net cash from operating activities in the consolidated annual cash-flow statement.
Derived consistently as operating cash flow plus the normalized negative capex value; it is not asserted to be the company's separately reported non-GAAP FCF.
Cash acquisition or purchase of productive assets / PPE and related capital assets where disclosed. It is stored as a negative cash outflow and displayed as a positive investment bar.
Cash and cash equivalents at year end, converted using the same annual ECB rate.
EUR figures are multiplied by the arithmetic annual average USD per EUR ECB reference exchange rate for the respective calendar year.

sources.title: SEC Companyfacts - Eni S.p.A.
sources.notes: Official SEC structured XBRL data derived from Eni annual Form 20-F filings.

sources.title: Eni Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
European Central Bank EUR/USD Reference Exchange Rates
sources.notes: Arithmetic annual average of daily USD per EUR ECB reference rates used for EUR-to-USD conversion.
